<!--
This project records design decisions as recipes:
"As a [role] working on [goal], I prefer [X] so that [reason]."
Framing your position that way makes the discussion concrete and easy to log
when it resolves. Example:
"As a self-hoster running behind a reverse proxy, I prefer configurable trust
of X-Forwarded-For so that rate limiting keys on the real client IP."
-->

## Alternatives

<!-- Other defensible positions, and their trade-offs. -->
